revision.text:
{{Otheruses|「若宮八幡神社」「若宮八幡社」を称する神社|若宮八幡（神社）の全般的な説明|若宮八幡宮}} '''若宮八幡神社'''（わかみやはちまんじんしゃ）、'''若宮八幡社'''（わかみやはちまんしゃ）は[[神社]]。[[日本]]各地にある。
* [[若宮八幡社 (佐久市)]] - 長野県佐久市岩村田 * [[若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)]] - 愛知県名古屋市中区 * [[若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)]] - 広島県三次市十日市 * [[若宮八幡社 (杵築市)]] - 大分県杵築市 * [[若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)]] - 大分県豊後高田市 * [[若宮八幡社 (大分市)]] - 大分県大分市
{{Aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:わかみやはちまんしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
```plaintext {{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}} '''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} - Located in {{ill|Saku, Nagano|ja|佐久市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} - Located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Nagoya|ja|中区 (名古屋市)}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Toyokawa, Aichi)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|ja|豊川市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kato, Hyōgo)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kato, Hyōgo|ja|加東市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miyoshi, Hiroshima|ja|三次市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitsuki, Ōita|ja|杵築市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Bungotakada, Ōita|ja|豊後高田市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōita City|ja|大分市}}, Ōita Prefecture.
{{Ambiguous}}
[[Category:Shrines with the same name]] [[Category:Hachiman Shrines]] ``` [[ja:若宮八幡神社]] ```

```plaintext {{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}} '''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} - Located in {{ill|Saku, Nagano|ja|佐久市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} - Located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Nagoya|ja|中区 (名古屋市)}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Toyokawa, Aichi)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|ja|豊川市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kato, Hyōgo)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kato, Hyōgo|ja|加東市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miyoshi, Hiroshima|ja|三次市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitsuki, Ōita|ja|杵築市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Bungotakada, Ōita|ja|豊後高田市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōita City|ja|大分市}}, Ōita Prefecture.
{{Ambiguous}}

{{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}} '''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} - Located in {{ill|Saku, Nagano|ja|佐久市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} - Located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Nagoya|ja|中区 (名古屋市)}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Toyokawa, Aichi)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|ja|豊川市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kato, Hyōgo)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kato, Hyōgo|ja|加東市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miyoshi, Hiroshima|ja|三次市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitsuki, Ōita|ja|杵築市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Bungotakada, Ōita|ja|豊後高田市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōita City|ja|大分市}}, Ōita Prefecture.
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.comment: 見出しを追加し、若宮八幡神社、若宮八幡社を振り分け。表記の統一。住所の重複の削除。関連項目の追加。
revision.text:
{{Otheruses|「若宮八幡神社」「若宮八幡社」を称する神社|若宮八幡（神社）の全般的な説明|若宮八幡宮}} '''若宮八幡神社'''（わかみやはちまんじんしゃ)、'''若宮八幡社'''（わかみやはちまんしゃ）は、日本各地に存在する[[神社]]。
== 主な若宮八幡神社 == * [[神楽坂若宮八幡神社]] – [[東京都]][[新宿区]][[若宮町 (新宿区)|若宮町]] * [[若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[長野県]][[佐久市]][[岩村田]] * [[若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[加東市]]新定 * [[若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[広島県]][[三次市]]十日市南 * [[若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[大分県]][[豊後高田市]]高田 * [[日出若宮八幡神社]] – 大分県[[速見郡]][[日出町]]
== 主な若宮八幡社 ==
* [[若宮八幡社 (加須市)|若宮八幡社]] – [[埼玉県]][[加須市]]北下新井 * [[若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)|若宮八幡社]] – [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[中区 (名古屋市)|中区]][[栄 (名古屋市)|栄]] * [[若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|若宮八幡社]] – 愛知県[[豊川市]]伊奈町 * [[若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|若宮八幡社]] – 大分県[[杵築市]]宮司 * [[若宮八幡社 (大分市)|若宮八幡社]] – 大分県[[大分市]]上野町
== 関連項目 ==
* [[若宮八幡宮]] * [[八幡宮]] {{Aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:わかみやはちまんしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:八幡信仰]]

{{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}} '''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|ja|日本}}.
* {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} - Located in {{ill|Saku, Nagano|ja|佐久市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} - Located in {{ill|Naka Ward, Nagoya|ja|中区 (名古屋市)}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Toyokawa, Aichi)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|ja|豊川市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Kato, Hyōgo)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kato, Hyōgo|ja|加東市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} - Located in {{ill|Miyoshi, Hiroshima|ja|三次市}}, Hiroshima Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kitsuki, Ōita|ja|杵築市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} - Located in {{ill|Bungotakada, Ōita|ja|豊後高田市}}, Ōita Prefecture. * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} - Located in {{ill|Ōita City|ja|大分市}}, Ōita Prefecture.
==dd==
{{Otheruses|Shrines called "Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja" or "Wakamiya Hachiman Sha"|General explanation of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}} '''Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja''' (若宮八幡神社) and '''Wakamiya Hachiman Sha''' (若宮八幡社) are {{ill|shrines|ja|神社}} found across Japan.
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社}} – [[Tokyo]], [[Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} – [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} – [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} – [[Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} – [[Ōita Prefecture]], [[Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)}} – [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} – [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya]], [[Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kitsuki)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮}} * {{ill|Hachiman-gū|ja|八幡宮}} {{Disambiguation}}

== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社}} – [[Tokyo]], [[Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)}} – [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)}} – [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)}} – [[Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)}} – [[Ōita Prefecture]], [[Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)}} – [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)}} – [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya]], [[Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi

== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=draft}} – [[Tokyo]], [[Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=draft}} – [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=draft}} – [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=draft}} – [[Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=draft}} – [[Ōita Prefecture]], [[Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=draft}} – [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)|12=draft}} – [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya]], [[Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=draft}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi

{{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}}'''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} found throughout {{ill|Japan|ja|日本|12=draft}}.
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=draft}} – [[Tokyo]], [[Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=draft}} – [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=draft}} – [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=draft}} – [[Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=draft}} – [[Ōita Prefecture]], [[Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=draft}} – [[Saitama Prefecture]], [[Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)|ja|若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)|12=draft}} – [[Aichi Prefecture]], [[Nagoya]], [[Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=draft}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=draft}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hachiman-gū|ja|八幡宮|12=draft}} {{Disambiguation}}

revision.comment: /* 主な若宮八幡神社 */
revision.text:
{{Otheruses|「若宮八幡神社」「若宮八幡社」を称する神社|若宮八幡（神社）の全般的な説明|若宮八幡宮}} '''若宮八幡神社'''（わかみやはちまんじんしゃ)、'''若宮八幡社'''（わかみやはちまんしゃ）は、日本各地に存在する[[神社]]。
== 主な若宮八幡神社 == * [[神楽坂若宮八幡神社]] – [[東京都]][[新宿区]][[若宮町 (新宿区)|若宮町]] * [[若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[長野県]][[佐久市]][[岩村田]] * [[若宮八幡神社 (高山市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[岐阜県]][[高山市]]石浦町 * [[若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[兵庫県]][[加東市]]新定 * [[若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[広島県]][[三次市]]十日市南 * [[若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|若宮八幡神社]] – [[大分県]][[豊後高田市]]高田 * [[日出若宮八幡神社]] – 大分県[[速見郡]][[日出町]]
== 主な若宮八幡社 ==
* [[若宮八幡社 (加須市)|若宮八幡社]] – [[埼玉県]][[加須市]]北下新井 * [[若宮八幡社 (名古屋市中区)|若宮八幡社]] – [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[中区 (名古屋市)|中区]][[栄 (名古屋市)|栄]] * [[若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|若宮八幡社]] – 愛知県[[豊川市]]伊奈町 * [[若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|若宮八幡社]] – 大分県[[杵築市]]宮司 * [[若宮八幡社 (大分市)|若宮八幡社]] – 大分県[[大分市]]上野町
== 関連項目 ==
* [[若宮八幡宮]] * [[八幡宮]] {{Aimai}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮八幡神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616258]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}}'''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrines]] found throughout [[:en:Japan|Japan]].
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=|1=Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107410077}} – [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[:en:Shinjuku Ward|Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|qq=}} – [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[:en:Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|qq=}} – [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|qq=}} – [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=|1=Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125319212}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|qq=|1=Wakamiyahachimansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131274497}} – [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * [[:en:Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)]] – [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[:en:Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|qq=|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}} * [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman-gū]] {{Disambiguation}}

== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107410077}} – [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[:en:Shinjuku Ward|Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|qq=}} – [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[:en:Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|qq=}} – [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|qq=}} – [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125319212}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|1=Wakamiyahachimansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131274497}} – [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * [[:en:Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)]] – [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[:en:Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}} * [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman-gū]] {{disambiguation}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:若宮八幡神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11616258]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:20, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Otheruses|Shrines named "Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine" or "Wakamiya Hachiman-sha"|General description of Wakamiya Hachiman shrines|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū}}'''Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine''' (若宮八幡神社, Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja) or '''Wakamiya Hachiman-sha''' (若宮八幡社, Wakamiya Hachiman-sha) are [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrines]] found throughout [[:en:Japan|Japan]].
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107410077}} – [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[:en:Shinjuku Ward|Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|qq=}} – [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[:en:Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|qq=}} – [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|qq=}} – [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125319212}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|1=Wakamiyahachimansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131274497}} – [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * [[:en:Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)]] – [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[:en:Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}} * [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman-gū]] {{disambiguation}}

== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107410077}} – [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[:en:Shinjuku Ward|Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|qq=}} – [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[:en:Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|qq=}} – [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|qq=}} – [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125319212}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|1=Wakamiyahachimansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131274497}} – [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * [[:en:Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)]] – [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[:en:Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}} * [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman-gū]] {{disambiguation}}

== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Jinja == * {{ill|Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|神楽坂若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Kagurazaka Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q107410077}} – [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]], [[:en:Shinjuku Ward|Shinjuku Ward]], [[Wakamiyachō (Shinjuku)|Wakamiyachō]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (佐久市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Saku, Nagano)|qq=}} – [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Saku, Nagano|Saku]], [[Iwamurada]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (加東市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Katō)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[:en:Katō, Hyōgo|Katō]], Shintei * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (三次市十日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Miyoshi, Hiroshima)|qq=}} – [[:en:Hiroshima Prefecture|Hiroshima Prefecture]], [[:en:Miyoshi, Hiroshima|Miyoshi]], Tōkaichi Minami * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman-gū (Bungotakada)|lt=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡神社 (豊後高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine (Bungotakada, Ōita)|qq=}} – [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Bungotakada, Ōita|Bungotakada]], Takada * {{ill|Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|日出若宮八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|1=Hiji Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125319212}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Hiji, Ōita|Hiji Town]], [[:en:Hayami District, Ōita|Hayami District]]
== Major Wakamiya Hachiman Sha == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|ja|若宮八幡社 (加須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Kazo)|1=Wakamiyahachimansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131274497}} – [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]], [[:en:Kazo, Saitama|Kazo]], Kitashimoshinden * [[:en:Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Naka Ward, Nagoya)]] – [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagoya|Nagoya]], [[:en:Naka-ku, Nagoya|Naka Ward]], [[:en:Sakae, Nagoya|Sakae]] * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja|若宮八幡社 (豊川市伊奈町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Sha (Toyokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Aichi Prefecture, [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], Inachō * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|ja|若宮八幡社 (杵築市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Kitsuki, Ōita)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Kitsuki, Ōita|Kitsuki]], Miyaji * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|ja|若宮八幡社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-sha (Ōita City)|qq=}} – Ōita Prefecture, [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita]], Uenomachi
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|ja|若宮八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman-gū|1=Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11616249}} * [[:en:Hachiman shrine|Hachiman-gū]] {{disambiguation}}
